creator: franco@opnsense.org
text:
Two things here:

1. Having a netpfil facility accommodating for multiple packet filters at the same time and saying you shouldn't mix it is not a good argument, because e.g. the ordering between ipfw/pf is easily made deterministic with something like:

# pfctl -d                                                                
# pfctl -e

2. route-to's if_output is derived from OpenBSD where only one packet filter exists.  There has been a proposal for several years to change that:

https://reviews.freebsd.org/D8877

It's practically been accepted back then, but was never merged. I have updated code based on stable/13.  I am happy to rebase on main if someone can take this on...


Cheers,
Franco
